title: lepidium lyratum
intro: Lepidium lyratum, also known as Chinese cress or lyre-leaved peppercress, is an annual plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lepidium lyratum include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and aid in digestion. Lepidium lyratum can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used to support cardiovascular health and reduce the risk of chronic diseases.
